title: Making a Clinic Appointment
description: Arun calls a clinic and chooses an appointment that fits his work schedule.
text:
Arun has had a cough for several days, so he calls a clinic near his office. The receptionist asks for his name and phone number. She offers an appointment in the morning, but Arun has a meeting then.

They choose a time after lunch. Arun writes the time in his calendar and arrives a little early.
speech_text:
Making a Clinic Appointment.

Arun has had a cough for several days, so he calls a clinic near his office. The receptionist asks for his name and phone number. She offers an appointment in the morning, but Arun has a meeting then.

They choose a time after lunch. Arun writes the time in his calendar and arrives a little early.
thai_text:
อรุณไอมาหลายวันจึงโทรไปที่คลินิกใกล้สำนักงาน. พนักงานต้อนรับถามชื่อและหมายเลขโทรศัพท์ของเขา. เธอเสนอเวลานัดช่วงเช้า แต่อรุณมีประชุมในเวลานั้น.

ทั้งสองจึงเลือกเวลาหลังอาหารกลางวัน. อรุณจดเวลาลงในปฏิทินและไปถึงก่อนเวลาเล็กน้อย.
